beam_center_rule: Xbeam = Ybeam = detpixels * pixel / 2 (recomputed per cell when pixel varies)
notes: Detector locked at 2048x2048. Gate reproduces the 320 suite verbatim so the float ladder (184/320) stays comparable. Base geometry grounded from run_parity_suite_5090.sh. data_root is one root under which both the crystal .hkl (data_root/crystals/*.hkl) and the AMAT inputs (data_root/A.mat, data_root/scaled.hkl) live; it is repo-relative and resolved to an absolute path by run.sh. base_geometry_dims names the dimensions whose baseline values form the invariant BASE geometry (distance/lambda/pixel), matching run_parity_suite_5090.sh.
